emails.subject: Re: PNG Local Production July 00
emails.body: Just send me $50 and we won't worry about it. I would also like a new golf shirt but I don't think I want the name Clinton on it right now. Try to get me an AEP shirt. Paul J Leanza@EES 07/21/2000 08:59 AM

emails.subject: Re: PNG Local Production July 00
emails.body: Here is what I know. We started pulling 430 MCF (443 dth) from pool N424PB effective 7-1-00 which was changed to 430 dth effective 7-18-00. I'm assuming pool N424PB is the CES/ENA non-priority pool. Let me know if we need to do anything different on our side. Paul Chris Germany@ECT 07/18/2000 05:23 PM
